text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism within the Karpathy AutoResearch loop. This will dynamically prioritize critical, recently added memories, preventing the accumulation of noise and ensuring the agent focuses on the most relevant information. This will significantly improve the efficiency of our consolidation pattern by reducing redundant processing and accelerating the learning process.
reason: Real-time scoring will address the recent 'WinError' by dynamically weighting memory importance, ensuring the agent learns from the most valuable data without being overwhelmed by irrelevant noise. This directly improves the plan's efficiency and effectiveness.
